channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: 社交媒体上大部分信息只会让人更焦虑
item.author: @LBan2050

item.title:
Wow, thank you so much!
CC Switch is a desktop app that helps users configure and manage providers ...
item.description:
Wow, thank you so much!
CC Switch is a desktop app that helps users configure and manage providers for AI tools like Claude Code and Codex. It makes importing and switching providers much easier with a one-time setup and a single click, instead of making users deal with a bunch of environment variables. It also supports MCP, Skills, session management, and more.
I’m currently working on Hermes support. I’d be truly grateful if you could recommend it if it turns out useful.
I really love the Hermes project, especially the community around it. I’ve already been recommending it to people around me. Really appreciate your work!
--- @Jason_Young1231 | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 29
item.author: @Jason_Young1231

item.title:
Try it immediately on Ollama's cloud:
ollama run gemma4:31b-cloud
Try it with OpenClaw: ollama ...
item.description:
Try it immediately on Ollama's cloud:
ollama run gemma4:31b-cloud
Try it with OpenClaw: ollama launch openclaw --model gemma4:31b-cloud
Try it with Claude Code: ollama launch claude --model gemma4:31b-cloud
Model page for all the Gemma 4 models to run locally:
https://t.co/kASqDIm1u3
--- @ollama | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 908
item.author: @ollama
